products.name: Classic Vanilla Banana Bread
products.description: Our original recipe with ripe bananas and a hint of vanilla. Moist, flavorful, and timeless.

products.name: Chocolate Chip Banana Bread
products.description: Loaded with premium dark chocolate chips. A decadent delicious twist on the classic.

products.name: Double Chocolate Banana Bread
products.description: Loaded with bittersweet chocolate and cocoa. A sophisticated twist on the classic.

products.name: Cashew/Peanut Banana Bread
products.description: Crunchy nuts add texture and richness. Perfect with your morning coffee.

products.name: Coconut Banana Bread
products.description: Tropical coconut flavor with a light, fluffy texture. A taste of paradise in every bite.

products.name: Oreos Banana Bread
products.description: Loaded with crushed Oreo cookies. A delicious cookies and cream twist on the classic.

products.name: Almond Banana Bread
products.description: Packed with sliced almond slivers. Toasted coconut flakes bring tropical sweetness throughout.

products.name: Nutella Banana Bread
products.description: Swirled with rich Nutella hazelnut spread. Indulgent, chocolatey perfection in every slice.
